responses: Hello! Welcome to the Internal Helpdesk. How can I assist you today?
Hi there! I'm your helpdesk assistant. What do you need help with?
Hey! I'm here to help. What's your question?
Goodbye! Have a great day. Feel free to return if you need more help.
Take care! The helpdesk is always here if you need us.
Bye! Hope I was able to help you today.
You're welcome! Let me know if there's anything else.
Happy to help! Is there anything else you need?
Glad I could assist! Don't hesitate to ask if you have more questions.

patterns: How do I reset my password?
Can't log in to my account
I am locked out of my account
Login not working due to password
responses:
To reset your password: 
1. Go to the company login portal.
2. Click 'Forgot Password' below the login form.
3. Enter your registered work email.
4. Check your inbox for a reset link (valid for 30 minutes).
5. Follow the link to set a new password.

If you don't receive the email within 5 minutes, check your spam folder or contact IT at it-support@company.com.

patterns: I entered wrong password too many times
responses:
Your account may be locked after 5 failed login attempts for security.

To unlock:
1. Wait 15 minutes for auto-unlock, OR
2. Contact IT Support immediately at it-support@company.com or call extension 1001.
3. Provide your Employee ID and Manager's name for verification.

IT will unlock your account within 30 minutes during business hours (9am–6pm, Mon–Fri).

patterns: How do I get started as a new employee?
Account not created for new employee
I just joined, what do I need to set up?
responses:
Welcome to the team! Here's your new employee IT checklist:

✅ Step 1: Collect your credentials from IT (Employee ID + Temp Password)
✅ Step 2: Log into the company portal at portal.company.com
✅ Step 3: Change your temporary password immediately
✅ Step 4: Set up Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) via the Authenticator App
✅ Step 5: Install required software (see IT Software List on the intranet)
✅ Step 6: Set up your company email in Outlook
✅ Step 7: Connect to company Wi-Fi using your Employee ID

For hardware issues (laptop, accessories), contact IT at extension 1001 or visit the IT Helpdesk room on Floor 2.

patterns: How do I connect to VPN?
Can't connect to company network remotely
responses:
To connect to the Company VPN:

1. Download the VPN client: Cisco AnyConnect (available on the IT portal > Software Downloads)
2. Install and open the application
3. Server address: vpn.company.com
4. Login with your Employee ID and company password
5. Approve the MFA push notification on your phone

🔴 Common Issues:
• VPN keeps disconnecting → Check your internet speed (minimum 10 Mbps required)
• Login failed → Ensure MFA app is synced to correct time
• Can't reach internal sites → Restart VPN client and try again

For persistent issues, email vpn-support@company.com with your Employee ID and error screenshot.

patterns: Software not installed on my laptop
Need VS Code on my system
responses:
Software Installation Process:

📦 Pre-approved software (install yourself):
→ Go to IT Portal > Software Center > select the software > click Install
→ Available tools: MS Office, Teams, Zoom, Slack, Chrome, VS Code, Python, Git

📋 Software not in the list (requires approval):
1. Submit a Software Request via ServiceDesk portal at helpdesk.company.com
2. Fill in: Software Name, Business Justification, License Cost (if any)
3. Your manager will approve the request
4. IT will install within 2–3 business days after approval

⚠️ Note: Do NOT install unlicensed or personal software on company devices. It violates IT policy.

patterns: How do I connect to office Wi-Fi?
responses:
Company Wi-Fi Setup:

📶 Network Name (SSID): CORP-OFFICE
🔐 Authentication: Use your Employee ID and company password

Connection Steps:
1. Click the Wi-Fi icon on your taskbar
2. Select 'CORP-OFFICE' from the network list
3. Enter your Employee ID as the username
4. Enter your company account password
5. Accept the security certificate if prompted

🔴 Troubleshooting:
• Wi-Fi not visible → Restart laptop Wi-Fi adapter (Fn + F2 on most laptops)
• Authentication failed → Ensure your password isn't expired
• Slow internet → Move closer to access point or call IT at ext. 1001
• Guest Wi-Fi for visitors: CORP-GUEST (Password: Welcome@123, changed monthly)

patterns: How do I set up my work email?
responses:
Company Email Setup (Outlook):

💻 On Desktop:
1. Open Outlook → File → Add Account
2. Enter your work email: yourname@company.com
3. Outlook will auto-detect settings
4. Enter your company password and approve MFA

📱 On Mobile (Outlook App):
1. Download 'Microsoft Outlook' from App Store / Play Store
2. Open → Add Account → Enter work email
3. Choose 'Work or School Account'
4. Sign in with your Employee ID and password
5. Approve MFA prompt

Email Server Settings (manual setup):
• Incoming: imap.company.com | Port: 993 | SSL: ON
• Outgoing: smtp.company.com | Port: 587 | TLS: ON

For email not received issues, check Junk/Spam folder first. For persistent issues, raise a ticket at helpdesk.company.com.

patterns: How many leaves do I have?
How many days off do I have?
responses:
To check your leave balance:

1. Log into the HR Portal at hr.company.com
2. Navigate to My Profile → Leave Management
3. You'll see a breakdown of:
   • Annual Leave (Earned Leave)
   • Sick Leave
   • Casual Leave
   • Compensatory Off

📅 Leave Year: April 1 – March 31
📌 Unused earned leaves (up to 30 days) carry forward to next year
📌 Sick and casual leaves lapse if unused

For discrepancies in your leave balance, contact HR at hr@company.com with your Employee ID.

patterns: How do I apply for vacation?
responses:
How to Apply for Leave:

1. Log in to HR Portal at hr.company.com
2. Go to Leave Management → Apply Leave
3. Select leave type: Annual / Sick / Casual / Comp-off / Special
4. Choose From Date and To Date
5. Add reason (mandatory for sick/special leaves)
6. Click Submit → Your manager receives an approval request

📋 Leave Rules:
• Annual Leave: Apply at least 3 days in advance
• Sick Leave: Can apply same day with medical certificate for absences >2 days
• Emergency Leave: Call/message your manager directly, apply in system later
• Half-day leave: Select 'Half Day' option and choose AM or PM session

Leave approval status appears in HR Portal under Leave History.

patterns: Where can I find my payslip?
responses:
Accessing Your Payslip:

1. Login to HR Portal → hr.company.com
2. Go to Payroll → Payslip / Salary Statement
3. Select Month and Year
4. Click Download PDF

📅 Payslip Availability: Payslips are available on the 1st of every month for the previous month's salary.

💰 Salary Credit Date: Last working day of each month

For queries on deductions, taxes, or salary discrepancies, email payroll@company.com with your Employee ID and the specific issue.

For Form 16 (annual tax certificate), it's available in HR Portal > Tax Documents every June.

Expense Reimbursement Process:

1. Log in to HR Portal → Finance → Expense Claims
2. Click 'New Expense Claim'
3. Fill in:
   • Expense Category (Travel / Food / Medical / Internet / Other)
   • Amount
   • Date of Expense
   • Purpose / Description
4. Upload scanned receipts (JPG or PDF, max 5MB each)
5. Submit for manager approval

📋 Policy Limits:
• Local Travel (cab/auto): Up to ₹500/day with receipt
• Outstation Travel: As per travel policy (see HR Portal > Policies)
• Food during official duty: Up to ₹300/meal
• Medical: Up to ₹15,000/year (with receipts)
• WFH Internet: Up to ₹1,000/month

⏱ Reimbursement timeline: Approved claims are processed within 7 working days and credited to your salary account.

Attendance System Guide:

🏢 Office Attendance:
• Use the biometric scanner at the entrance on arrival and departure
• Also visible in HR Portal under Attendance > Monthly View

🏠 Work from Home Attendance:
1. Login to HR Portal → Attendance → Mark WFH
2. Select date and click 'Mark Present – WFH'
3. Must be done before 10:30 AM

🔧 Attendance Correction (missed punch):
1. HR Portal → Attendance → Regularization Request
2. Select the date, enter in/out times, add reason
3. Manager approves within 24 hours

📌 Note: More than 3 unregularized absences per month may affect salary. Queries: hr@company.com

Hardware Issue Support:

🔴 Immediate Steps:
• Laptop won't turn on: Hold power button 10 seconds → wait 30 seconds → press power again
• Black screen: Check monitor cable → try Fn + F4 to switch display
• Overheating: Ensure ventilation, use on hard surface, not on bed/lap
• Slow laptop: Restart the system, check for Windows updates, close unused apps

🛠 To Raise a Hardware Ticket:
1. Go to helpdesk.company.com
2. Click 'New Ticket' → Category: Hardware
3. Describe the issue and attach a photo if possible
4. Severity:
   - Critical (can't work at all) → Response in 2 hours
   - High (partial work) → Response in 4 hours
   - Medium/Low → Response by next business day

For urgent issues, call IT at extension 1001 or walk to IT Helpdesk on Floor 2.

patterns: How to connect to office printer?
responses:
Office Printer Setup:

🖨 Add Printer on Windows:
1. Go to Settings → Devices → Printers & Scanners
2. Click 'Add a Printer or Scanner'
3. Select your floor printer from the list (e.g., PRN-FL3-HP for Floor 3)
4. Driver installs automatically

🍎 Add Printer on Mac:
1. System Preferences → Printers & Scanners → '+'
2. Select the printer from the list
3. Click Add

📍 Printer Locations by Floor:
• Floor 1: Reception Area (B&W + Color)
• Floor 2: Near Pantry (B&W only)
• Floor 3: Conference Room corridor (Color)
• Floor 4: HR Department (B&W)

⚠ Printer Offline fix: Restart the printer using the power button, then try printing again. If issue persists, raise a ticket at helpdesk.company.com.

patterns: How to book a conference room?
responses:
Meeting Room Booking:

📅 How to Book:
1. Go to the intranet → Room Booking OR use Outlook Calendar
2. In Outlook: New Event → Add Location → Browse Rooms
3. Select room based on floor and capacity
4. Add meeting details and invite attendees
5. Send the invite — the room is auto-reserved

🏢 Available Rooms:
• Atlas (Floor 1) – Capacity: 20 | AV: Yes | Video call: Yes
• Nexus (Floor 2) – Capacity: 8 | Whiteboard: Yes
• Orion (Floor 3) – Capacity: 4 | Ideal for interviews
• Zenith (Floor 4) – Capacity: 30 | Boardroom | AV: Full setup

⏱ Booking Rules:
• Max booking: 4 hours at a time
• Cancel at least 30 minutes before to free the room
• No-shows after 15 minutes release the room automatically

For AV setup support, contact facilities@company.com.

patterns: I need access to a folder
Grant me access to a drive
responses:
Access & Permissions Request:

📋 How to Request Access:
1. Go to helpdesk.company.com → New Request → Access Management
2. Fill in:
   • System/Folder/Application name
   • Type of access needed (Read / Edit / Full Control)
   • Business reason
3. Your manager will receive an approval notification
4. IT provisions access within 1 business day after approval

🔐 Common Access Types:
• Network Drive (G: / H: drive) → IT team provisions
• SharePoint / Teams channel → Owner adds directly
• CRM / ERP system → Application Admin + Manager approval
• Cloud storage (OneDrive) → Auto-provisioned on account creation

⛔ Access Removal (for resigned/transferred employees):
• Managers must raise a 'Revoke Access' ticket immediately on employee's last day.

patterns: How to back up my data?
Can I recover a deleted document?
How often is data backed up?
responses:
Data Backup & Recovery:

☁ Automatic Backup:
• All files saved in OneDrive or SharePoint are automatically backed up continuously
• Company policy: Save all work files to OneDrive — not to the local C: drive

🔄 Recover Accidentally Deleted Files:
• OneDrive: Go to onedrive.com → Recycle Bin → Restore (within 30 days)
• Emails: Outlook → Deleted Items → Recover Deleted Items from Server
• Local files (C: drive): Right-click folder → Restore Previous Versions (if enabled)

🗄 IT Backup Schedule:
• Server data: Backed up daily at midnight
• Retention: 30 days rolling backup

⚠ For critical data loss (ransomware, major corruption), contact IT immediately at it-support@company.com or call extension 1001. Do NOT restart the system — it may overwrite recoverable data.

Office Timings:

🕘 Standard Working Hours:
• Monday to Friday: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM
• Saturday: 9:00 AM – 1:00 PM (as per project requirement)
• Sunday: Holiday

⏱ Core Hours (mandatory presence/login):
• 10:00 AM – 4:00 PM (all employees must be available)

🔁 Flexible Working:
• Flexi-time allowed between 8:00 AM – 9:00 PM window
• Complete 9 hours/day including 1-hour lunch break
• Must be approved by your reporting manager

🏠 WFH Policy:
• Up to 2 days WFH per week (as per team policy)
• WFH days require manager approval in advance via HR Portal

🌙 Overtime: Overtime is compensated as Comp-off, approved by department head. No monetary OT unless on a special project agreement.

patterns: What are the holidays this year?
responses:
Company Holiday List (2024):

📅 Mandatory Public Holidays:
1. Republic Day – January 26 (Friday)
2. Holi – March 25 (Monday)
3. Good Friday – March 29 (Friday)
4. Ambedkar Jayanti – April 14 (Sunday)
5. Labour Day – May 1 (Wednesday)
6. Independence Day – August 15 (Thursday)
7. Gandhi Jayanti – October 2 (Wednesday)
8. Dussehra – October 12 (Saturday)
9. Diwali – November 1 (Friday)
10. Christmas – December 25 (Wednesday)

📋 Restricted Holidays (choose 2 from the optional list):
• Eid, Navratri, Raksha Bandhan, Guru Nanak Jayanti, Pongal, Onam

Full list available on HR Portal → Holiday Calendar 2024.
For shift employees, holidays may differ — check with your team lead.

ID Card / Access Card Issues:

🪪 Lost or Damaged ID Card:
1. Report immediately to Admin at admin@company.com or extension 1005
2. Fill the 'ID Card Replacement' form on the intranet
3. A temporary access card will be issued within the same day
4. New permanent card is ready in 3 working days
5. ₹200 fee for replacement (deducted from salary)

🔴 Card Not Working at Entry Gate:
• Contact Security desk at the main entrance
• They will issue a Visitor Pass temporarily
• Raise a ticket at helpdesk.company.com > Category: Admin > ID Card Issue

👤 New Employee ID Card:
• HR initiates this during Day 1 onboarding
• If not received within 3 days of joining, email hr@company.com

📸 For card update (photo/name change after marriage etc.):
Email admin@company.com with updated photo and supporting document.

Office Canteen / Cafeteria:

🍽 Timings:
• Breakfast: 8:00 AM – 10:00 AM
• Lunch: 12:30 PM – 2:30 PM
• Snacks/Tea: 4:00 PM – 5:00 PM

🥗 Daily Menu is posted every morning on:
• Intranet Home Page → Canteen Menu
• Canteen Notice Board (Ground Floor)
• Company WhatsApp group

💰 Pricing:
• Breakfast combo: ₹40–₹60
• Full Lunch (Veg): ₹70 | (Non-Veg): ₹90
• Snacks: ₹20–₹40

🥦 Special Requirements:
• Veg/Non-veg options available daily
• For dietary needs (diabetic, gluten-free), inform canteen staff 1 day in advance

Payment: Via canteen card (load money at reception) or UPI. Cash not accepted.
I am the Internal Knowledge Assistant.
I'm the company AI assistant.
I'm your Employee Support AI.

Training & Learning Programs:

📚 How to Enroll:
1. Login to HR Portal → Learning & Development
2. Browse available courses by category (Technical / Soft Skills / Compliance / Leadership)
3. Click 'Enroll' on your chosen course
4. Manager notification is sent automatically for approval

🎓 Types of Programs:
• Online Courses: Self-paced via Coursera / LinkedIn Learning (company subscription)
• Internal Workshops: Monthly sessions by senior staff (schedule on intranet)
• External Certifications: PMP, AWS, Azure, etc. – Company reimburses up to ₹25,000/year with bond condition
• Mandatory Compliance Training: POSH, Data Privacy, Code of Conduct (annual)

📝 Certification Reimbursement:
• Submit course completion certificate + invoice to HR
• Bond: 12 months continued employment post certification

Queries: learning@company.com

Grievance & Complaint Process:

📋 Step 1 – Try informal resolution:
• Talk to your direct manager or HR Business Partner first
• Most issues can be resolved informally at this stage

📝 Step 2 – Formal Grievance:
1. Go to HR Portal → Grievance Management → File New Grievance
2. Describe the issue in detail
3. Select category: HR / IT / Admin / Harassment / Ethics
4. Submit — HR acknowledges within 24 hours
5. Resolution timeline: 15 working days

🔒 POSH (Prevention of Sexual Harassment):
• Contact ICC (Internal Complaints Committee) at icc@company.com
• Anonymous complaints accepted
• Your identity is strictly protected

🕵 Whistleblower / Ethics Violations:
• Ethics Hotline: 1800-XXX-XXXX (toll-free, anonymous)
• Email: ethics@company.com

⚠ All complaints are treated with strict confidentiality. Retaliation against complainants is prohibited.

Performance Appraisal Cycle:

📅 Timeline:
• Goal Setting: April – May (beginning of financial year)
• Mid-year Review: October
• Annual Appraisal: January – March
• Increment Effective: April 1st

📝 Process:
1. Self-appraisal form opens in HR Portal in January
2. Fill in your achievements against KRAs set at year start
3. Manager review and rating
4. HR normalisation
5. Results communicated by March end

⭐ Rating Scale:
• 5 – Outstanding | 4 – Exceeds Expectations | 3 – Meets Expectations
• 2 – Needs Improvement | 1 – Underperformance

💰 Increment Range (approximate):
• Rating 5: 15–20% | Rating 4: 10–15% | Rating 3: 7–10%
• Rating 1–2: No increment (PIP may be initiated)

For promotion queries, speak directly with your manager or HR BP.

patterns: I want to leave the company
responses:
Resignation & Exit Process:

📝 How to Resign:
1. Email your formal resignation to your manager and hr@company.com
2. State your intended last working day based on notice period
3. HR will send an acknowledgment within 2 business days

⏱ Notice Period:
• 0–1 year service: 1 month notice
• 1–3 years service: 2 months notice
• 3+ years service: 3 months notice

💳 Notice Buyout:
• You can pay salary in lieu to reduce notice (subject to management approval)
• HR calculates the buyout amount

✅ Exit Checklist:
• Return laptop, ID card, access card to IT/Admin
• Clear all pending leaves or encash (as per policy)
• No-dues clearance from IT, Finance, Admin, and Manager
• Exit interview with HR

💰 Full & Final Settlement:
• Processed within 45 days of last working day
• Includes: Balance salary, Leave encashment, Gratuity (if eligible), PF transfer

Contact hr@company.com for all exit-related queries.

patterns: Can you help me with something else?
responses:
I'm sorry, I didn't quite understand that. Here's how you can get human support:

🖥 IT Support: it-support@company.com | Ext. 1001
👤 HR Support: hr@company.com | Ext. 1002
🏢 Admin: admin@company.com | Ext. 1005
📋 Raise a Ticket: helpdesk.company.com

You can also try rephrasing your question and I'll do my best to help!
